# considerITman

> Microsoft 365 security and compliance blog. Practical configuration guides, policy walkthroughs, and architecture deep-dives for IT professionals managing M365 E3 and E5 environments.
> Author: Alexander Schirmer | Site: https://consideritman.github.io/

## Posts

- [How to Configure DLP Policies in Microsoft 365](https://consideritman.github.io/posts/configure-dlp-policies-microsoft-365/): Configure DLP policies in Microsoft Purview step by step. Covers SITs, simulation mode, Teams, Endpoint, and Copilot....
- [Complete Guide: Conditional Access Policies in Entra ID](https://consideritman.github.io/posts/configure-conditional-access-entra-id/): Step-by-step guide to Conditional Access in Microsoft Entra ID. Covers policy anatomy, grant controls, sign-in risk,...
- [My Post](https://consideritman.github.io/posts/my-post/)
- [Hello World](https://consideritman.github.io/posts/hello-world/)
